Created attachment 202152
Danish translation for INDEX.keymaps/INDEX.fonts

Me trying to add danish translation to these files:

    share/syscons/fonts/INDEX.fonts
    share/syscons/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps
    share/vt/fonts/INDEX.fonts
    share/vt/keymaps/INDEX.keymaps

I also removed some trailing spaces and moved a few lines so its more in order.
